description: A clean white screenshot card formatted as a Truth Social post from 'Donald J. Trump @realDonaldTrump' (circular American-flag-themed avatar, verified check and black '+' badge at top). It is a designed/branded text graphic posted by the Rapid Response 47 account to amplify a presidential post; the styling is the platform's own UI, reproduced as a shareable image. The body text reads in full: 'In Maryland, they sent out 500,000 Illegal Mail In Ballots, and they got caught! So now, they're going to send out 500,000 more Mail In Ballots, but nobody knows what's happening with the first 500,000 they sent. In addition, many of these Ballots went to Democrats, so any Republican running in Maryland doesn't have a chance! This was done by the Corrupt Governor of the State, Wes Moore. He allowed this to happen in order to make sure that Democrats win. It never made sense to me that Maryland was considered an automatic Democrat State, but now I see why. I'm sure this has gone on for years. I'm going to ask the Attorney General of the United States, and the DOJ, to bring an immediate investigation into this situation. President DONALD J. TRUMP'. Messaging technique: amplification of an unverified voter-fraud allegation against a named Democratic governor, using the authority of the presidency and a call for a DOJ investigation. Target audience: MAGA base and conservative voters.
notable_text: In Maryland, they sent out 500,000 Illegal Mail In Ballots, and they got caught! ... This was done by the Corrupt Governor of the State, Wes Moore. ... I'm going to ask the Attorney General of the United States, and the DOJ, to bring an immediate investigation
